data.title: Anumana Secures FDA Clearance for First-of-Its-Kind ECG-AI Algorithm for Early Detection of Pulmonary Hypertension
data.description: Anumana, a company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has recently obtained clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its pulmonary hypertension (PH) algorithm. This clearance was granted under the FDA's 510(k) program.

data.title: CHAMPION-AF study of the WATCHMAN FLX™ Left Atrial Appendage Closure Device as a first-line therapy for stroke risk reduction meets all primary and secondary safety and efficacy endpoints
data.description: New data reveals that the WATCHMAN FLX device offers better protection from bleeding compared to blood thinners in patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation. The device showed statistically superior efficacy and was presented at ACC.26. These findings were published concurrently in The New Journal, marking a significant advancement in treatment options with important implications for the medical community.

data.title: HI-PEITHO trial demonstrates Boston Scientific EKOS™ Endovascular System is superior to standard of care for treatment of acute pulmonary embolism
data.description: A recent global randomized trial revealed a significant reduction in clinical event rates for patients with intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism (PE) who were treated with the EKOS device in addition to anticoagulation compared to those receiving anticoagulation alone. These groundbreaking findings were presented at ACC.26 and were simultaneously published. The study highlights the potential benefits of using the EKOS device alongside standard anticoagulation therapy for PE patients, indicating promising results in improving outcomes.

data.description: The current trading price of BCH stands at $480.60, indicating a positive trend with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 53. The price is hovering close to the upper Bollinger Band resistance. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of BCH reaching a resistance level of $497 or experiencing a retracement towards the support level at $451.

data.title: Google to support $5B Anthropic data center in Texas; US judge halts effort to limit AI firm's operations.
data.description: Google and various lenders have joined forces to provide financing for a sizable $5 billion Texas data center project for Anthropic, an artificial intelligence company. This initiative comes as a response to a recent development where a US judge intervened and prevented the federal government from imposing restrictions on Anthropic's operations.

data.title: AI technology can exploit arbitrage opportunities in prediction markets within seconds, outperforming humans due to  structural advantage.
data.description: AI-driven systems have a structural edge over humans in exploiting arbitrage opportunities in prediction markets, which can last for mere seconds. This advantage allows these systems to capitalize on market discrepancies swiftly and efficiently. This highlights the fast-paced and dynamic nature of prediction markets, where split-second decisions can make a significant impact on profits.

data.title: Record Your Passion: TORRAS Partners with Portugal Football for the Season Ahead
data.description: On March 28, 2026, it was announced that Portugal will partake in the upcoming World Cup, marking a significant moment for the team. The last time Portugal participated in a World Cup hosted in the United States was in 1994. This year, they have the opportunity to showcase their talent once again on American grounds, ending a 32-year absence from this stage. This event holds special importance for the team and its fans, unveiling a new chapter in their football journey.
